name: Okta ThreatInsight Suspected Threats Not Blocked (30 days)
description: Detects Okta ThreatInsight threat-detected events where suspicious activity was not explicitly denied or blocked.
query: SELECT l.uuid AS id, l.actor_id, COALESCE(u.login, u.email, l.actor_id, l.actor_type, 'unknown') AS account_name, l.severity, l.outcome, l.published FROM okta_system_logs l LEFT JOIN okta_users u ON u.id = l.actor_id WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(l.event_type, '')) = 'security.threat.detected' AND LOWER(COALESCE(l.outcome, '')) NOT IN ('deny', 'denied', 'blocked') AND l.published >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL '30 days'
remediation: Investigate ThreatInsight detections immediately, validate session legitimacy, and enforce stronger sign-in protections for affected users.
